name: Bobrito Bandito
lore:
Lore of Bobrito Bandito
                                    


This character is a beaver, distinctively adorned with a menstruation and wielding a Tommy gun. He is often depicted with a firearm in one hand and a cigarette in the other, suggesting that he might be affiliated with the world of gangsters. The iconic phrase associated with this character is the catchy template: 'OI OI OI, Bobrito Bandito?!'
Occasionally, this character appears reminiscent of a video game icon, adding a layer of nostalgia and playfulness to his persona.
Description original text
Oi Oi Oi, Bobrito Bandito?
El bobrito gangsterito, banditelli don bobrelli, el bandito bobrito gangsterito, bobrito bandito?
Wo, War, War, Bobrito Bandito!?
Gangster Beaver, Gangster Don Beaver, Gangster Gangster Beaver, Bobrito Bandito!?
